top3.sql:
SELECT SUM(points) 
FROM results 
WHERE driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE position = 91 
    ORDER BY raceId DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT wins
FROM driverStandings
WHERE position = 91
ORDER BY points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(points) 
FROM results 
WHERE driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE position = 91 
    ORDER BY raceId DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT wins 
FROM driverStandings 
WHERE driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE position = 91 
    ORDER BY raceId DESC 
    LIMIT 1
) 
AND raceId = (
    SELECT MAX(raceId) 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE driverId = (
        SELECT driverId 
        FROM driverStandings 
        WHERE position = 91 
        ORDER BY raceId DESC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
);

SELECT wins
FROM driverStandings
WHERE position = 91
ORDER BY points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(points) 
FROM results 
WHERE driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE position = 91 
    ORDER BY raceId DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT wins 
FROM driverStandings 
WHERE driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE position = 91 
    ORDER BY raceId DESC 
    LIMIT 1
) 
AND raceId = (
    SELECT MAX(raceId) 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE driverId = (
        SELECT driverId 
        FROM driverStandings 
        WHERE position = 91 
        ORDER BY raceId DESC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM driverStandings 
WHERE driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE position = 91 
    ORDER BY raceId DESC 
    LIMIT 1
) AND position = 1;

FROM results 
WHERE driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM driverStandings 
    WHERE position = 91 
    ORDER BY raceId DESC 
    LIMIT 1
);
